meta.title: Marić Law Office | Loznica, Serbia
meta.description: Marić Law Office has been providing legal assistance to individuals and legal entities since 1994. Criminal, labor, civil, administrative, commercial, and misdemeanor law.
meta.keywords: lawyer Loznica, law office Serbia, legal assistance, Marić attorney, criminal law, labor law, civil law

hero.title: Law Office
hero.subtitle: Legal certainty built on experience since 1994

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Over three decades of legal practice
about.description: Marić Law Office was established in January 1994, headquartered in Loznica, and has been continuously providing legal assistance to individuals and legal entities throughout the territory of the Republic of Serbia.
about.services: The legal assistance we provide is based on giving legal advice and opinions, drafting general and individual legal acts, contracts, statements, and other documents, as well as representing clients before courts, administrative bodies, organizations, and other entities.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive legal assistance across all key areas of law

criminal.title: Criminal Law
criminal.description: Our office provides expert legal assistance in all stages of criminal proceedings -defense of suspects, victim representation, plea agreements, and rehabilitation.
criminal.full:
In the field of criminal law, our office provides expert legal assistance to individuals and legal entities in all stages of proceedings.

Pre-criminal proceedings defense -we attend suspect interrogations, provide legal assistance during statements before police and prosecution, protect the rights of detained persons, and submit proposals and objections to the competent prosecutor.

Defense during investigation and main hearing -we actively participate in evidentiary proceedings, propose and challenge evidence, examine witnesses and experts, draft submissions, and represent clients before courts of all instances.

Appeals and legal remedies -we analyze verdicts and rulings, identify violations of law and procedural irregularities, and file appeals and requests for legality protection.

Plea agreements -we conduct negotiations with the prosecution, assess procedural risks, and represent clients during court confirmation of agreements.

Rehabilitation and conviction erasure -we file requests for rehabilitation, erasure of conditional sentences, and removal of legal consequences from criminal records.

Victim representation -we file criminal complaints on behalf of injured parties and establish property claims in criminal proceedings.

Juvenile defense and representation -we provide specialized legal assistance to juvenile offenders and injured minors, in accordance with the Juvenile Offenders Act.

labor.title: Labor Law
labor.description: Our office provides legal support to employers and employees in all aspects of labor law -contract drafting, regulations, representation in labor disputes and mobbing cases.
labor.full:
Our law office provides legal support to employers and employees in all aspects of labor law, including drafting key legal documents and representation in labor disputes.

Drafting documents for employers -employment contracts and other work engagement agreements, work regulations, organizational and systematization rules, occupational safety regulations, internal whistleblowing procedures, anti-harassment policies, personal data protection regulations, and confidentiality agreements.

Employer advisory -we consult with HR departments and management on matters of employment termination, disciplinary measures, employee damage compensation, foreign worker employment, and worker assignment.

Employee representation in court proceedings -annulment of termination decisions, annulment of contract amendments, annulment of disciplinary measures, compensation for workplace injuries, workplace harassment (mobbing), and employment claims (unpaid wages, transportation, meal allowances, vacation pay, and other claims).

civil.title: Civil Law
civil.description: Our office provides expert legal assistance in property, inheritance, and family law -real estate, probate proceedings, divorce, and alimony.
civil.full:
Our law office provides comprehensive legal assistance in civil law, with extensive experience in resolving complex legal matters.

Property law -representation in proceedings related to ownership, co-ownership and joint ownership rights, easements, liens, possession, and all forms of property relations. We advise clients on purchase, gift, and exchange of real estate, verify legal status of properties, and prepare all necessary documentation.

Inheritance law -representation in probate proceedings, drafting of wills and lifetime maintenance agreements, conducting inheritance disputes, submitting inheritance declarations, and obtaining probate decisions.

Family law -representation in divorce proceedings (mutual and contested), marital property division, child custody, alimony, paternity recognition and contestation, adoption, and deprivation of parental rights.

administrative.title: Administrative Law
administrative.description: Our office provides legal assistance in all administrative proceedings before state, provincial, and local government authorities, as well as in administrative disputes.
administrative.full:
Our law office provides legal assistance in all administrative proceedings and administrative disputes, representing clients before government authorities and courts.

Administrative proceedings -representation before state, provincial, and local government authorities in proceedings for issuing permits, decisions, and other administrative acts. Drafting appeals, objections, and requests for review of administrative decisions.

Administrative disputes -initiating and conducting administrative disputes before the Administrative Court, drafting lawsuits, representation at hearings, and filing extraordinary legal remedies.

Specialized areas -construction and urban planning permits, tax decisions, inspection proceedings, expropriation proceedings, real estate cadastre, environmental law, and proceedings before regulatory bodies.

commercial.title: Commercial Law
commercial.description: Our office provides strategic legal support to entrepreneurs and companies -establishment, contract drafting, status changes, bankruptcy, and liquidation.
commercial.full:
Our law office provides comprehensive legal support to entrepreneurs and legal entities, adapting to the specific needs of each client.

Establishment and registration -founding sole proprietorships, limited liability companies (LLC), joint-stock companies, and other legal forms, establishing representative offices and branches of foreign legal entities, registering associations and foundations.

Corporate governance -drafting founding acts, articles of association, bylaws, and management body decisions, status changes (mergers, acquisitions, divisions), share transfers, transitioning from sole proprietor to LLC.

Contract law -drafting all types of business contracts, including sale and purchase, lease, franchise, license, agency, distribution, and other contracts with domestic and international elements.

Dispute representation -civil and non-contentious proceedings before commercial courts, debt collection, commercial offenses, bankruptcy, and liquidation.

misdemeanor.title: Misdemeanor Law
misdemeanor.description: Our office provides expert legal assistance in all areas of misdemeanor law -representation in proceedings, advisory services, and defense preparation.
misdemeanor.full:
Our law office provides expert legal assistance to individuals and legal entities in all areas of misdemeanor law.

Representation in misdemeanor proceedings -we represent clients before misdemeanor courts and competent authorities in all types of misdemeanor proceedings, including traffic, customs, tax, foreign exchange, and other violations.

Advisory and legal assistance -we provide detailed information to clients about their rights and obligations, potential consequences of misdemeanor proceedings, and strategies for reducing sanctions.

Defense preparation -expert case preparation using extensive knowledge and experience in misdemeanor law, developing defense strategies aimed at achieving optimal outcomes.

Misdemeanor admission agreements -negotiating with competent authorities, risk assessment, and representing clients in the process of concluding admission agreements.

Appeals and legal remedies -filing appeals against first-instance verdicts, requests for retrial, and extraordinary legal remedies.

humanRights.title: Human Rights Protection
humanRights.description: Our office provides representation before the Constitutional Court of Serbia and the European Court of Human Rights in Strasbourg -constitutional complaints, petitions, and fundamental freedoms protection.
humanRights.full:
Our law office provides specialized representation services in human rights protection proceedings, ensuring the highest level of legal protection available to an individual.

Constitutional complaint -representation of parties in proceedings before the Constitutional Court of the Republic of Serbia, drafting and filing constitutional complaints for violation or denial of human or minority rights and freedoms guaranteed by the Constitution.

European Court of Human Rights -preparation and submission of applications to the European Court of Human Rights in Strasbourg, representation in proceedings before the Court, and monitoring enforcement of judgments.

Areas of protection -right to a fair trial, freedom of expression, prohibition of discrimination, right to property, right to privacy, prohibition of torture and inhuman treatment, right to liberty and security of person, and other rights guaranteed by the European Convention on Human Rights.

diaspora.title: Diaspora
diaspora.description: Legal services for Serbian citizens abroad -inheritance proceedings, real estate, documentation, divorce, recognition of foreign decisions, citizenship.
diaspora.full:
Marić Law Office provides legal services for Serbian citizens living abroad, enabling completion of legal matters without the need to travel to Serbia.

Inheritance proceedings -we manage the entire succession process, submit inheritance declarations on behalf of clients, obtain inheritance decisions, and execute changes in public registries, all without the client's physical presence.

Real estate transactions -with a notarized power of attorney, we represent clients in selling, purchasing, or exchanging properties. We verify documentation, ensure transparency, and manage the entire process.

Document acquisition -vital records extracts (birth, death, marriage certificates), residence certificates, cadastral extracts, criminal record clearances, and all other documentation from across Serbia, with international delivery.

Divorce -we handle mutual dissolution agreements, file divorce suits, and manage marital property division disputes without requiring the client's court appearance.

Recognition of foreign court decisions -decisions issued by foreign authorities have no legal effect in Serbia until recognized by Serbian courts. We manage recognition and enforcement proceedings.

Citizenship -we obtain citizenship certificates and represent clients in Serbian citizenship acquisition procedures.

familyAndInheritance.title: Family and Inheritance Law
familyAndInheritance.seoTitle: Family and Inheritance Law Attorney Loznica
familyAndInheritance.description: Our office provides expert legal assistance in family and inheritance matters. With extensive experience, we protect your rights and efficiently resolve legal challenges.
familyAndInheritance.full:
Our office provides expert legal assistance in family and inheritance matters. With extensive experience, we protect your rights and efficiently resolve legal challenges.

Our office provides expert legal assistance in all aspects of family and inheritance law, including the following services:
- **Divorce (mutual and contested)**
- **Exercise of parental rights**
- **Deprivation of parental rights**
- **Alimony (child support)**
- **Parenting time**
- **Division of marital property**
- **Division of non-marital property**
- **Protection against domestic violence**
- **Lifetime distribution of property**
- **Will drafting**
- **Lifetime maintenance agreement**
- **Probate proceedings**
- **Challenging lifetime maintenance agreements**

With experience in these areas, our team provides precise and efficient legal services to ensure your rights are protected and all proceedings are conducted in accordance with the law.

If during the marriage marital relations become seriously and permanently disturbed or if the joint life of the spouses can objectively no longer be maintained, they have the right to divorce.

Divorce entails other issues, such as the exercise of parental rights and the division of joint property, so we advise engaging an experienced family and inheritance lawyer in such situations.

contractsAndRealEstate.title: Contracts and Real Estate
contractsAndRealEstate.seoTitle: Real Estate and Contract Attorney Loznica
contractsAndRealEstate.description: Our office offers professional drafting and legal assistance with all types of contracts and real estate matters, backed by years of experience in property law relations.
contractsAndRealEstate.full:
Our office provides comprehensive legal assistance in the field of contracts and property law relations. With experience in this area, we draft, analyze, and legally verify all types of contracts, as well as represent clients in court proceedings related to property rights.

Types of contracts we handle:

- **Real estate purchase agreement** - complete documentation preparation and notarization

- **Gift agreement** - ensures clarity and legal certainty in property transfer

- **Lease agreement** - precisely defined lease terms with protection for both parties

- **Property exchange agreement**

- **Division of marital property agreement**

- **Investment agreement**

- **Lifetime maintenance agreement**

- **Construction agreement**

- **Property partition agreement**

- **Debt assumption and accession agreement**

- **Commercial and labor law contracts**

- **Will (testament)**

In addition to contract drafting, our office has experience in conducting court proceedings related to property law relations, protecting client rights and ensuring their legal protection at all stages of the proceedings.

divorce.title: Divorce
divorce.description: Our divorce lawyers provide detailed counseling, document preparation, and court representation to achieve the best possible solution while protecting your interests.
divorce.full:
Divorce is one of the most sensitive proceedings in family law because it involves not only the termination of the spouses' joint life but also resolving issues of parental rights exercise, parenting time, alimony, and the division of joint property.

Divorce can be carried out in two ways:
- **Mutual divorce**
- **Contested divorce (divorce lawsuit)**

When to choose a mutual divorce? -Mutual divorce means the spouses agree on all key issues: child custody, visits, alimony, division of joint property.
Advantages: faster process, lower costs, fewer conflicts, less emotional stress.
We assist in preparing the agreement, negotiations, and legally ensuring that the agreement is acceptable to the court and enforceable.

Contested divorce (divorce lawsuit) -When spouses cannot reach an agreement on key issues, divorce is initiated through a lawsuit.

Basic characteristics of contested divorce:
- The process takes longer than a mutual divorce because the court examines evidence, proposals, and testimonies.
- The lawsuit must contain data about spouses, date of marriage, reasons why the marriage can no longer be maintained, and specific child and property requests.
- The court makes a decision after a hearing and witnesses, and sometimes based on expert evaluation.
- Costs are higher due to more hearings and legal actions.

If you are unsure whether a mutual divorce is possible in your case or a lawsuit is needed, a divorce lawyer will suggest the best legal path after reviewing documentation and talking with you.

Frequently Asked Questions -

Where do you file for divorce? -The divorce lawsuit is filed with the competent basic court according to the place of residence of one of the spouses. You can do this in person at the court clerk's office, or a divorce lawyer can draft and submit the document for you.

How long does a mutual divorce take? -A mutual divorce can be completed relatively quickly, usually at a single hearing, if everything has been agreed upon.

Do spouses have to attend hearings? -If you have opted for a mutual divorce, the spouses do not have to be present at the hearing — your divorce lawyer will appear on your behalf. However, if you have opted for a contested divorce, your personal attendance may be required in many cases.

Who pays the court costs for divorce? -The costs of divorce are borne by both parties, unless the court decides otherwise.
